codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the scoped module-restructure requirements: category modules were created, EvalProblem gained backward-compatible optional fields, eval_problems.py re-exports legacy checks/helpers/lists, and compatibility tests were added. No blocking correctness issues found in the reviewed feature diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture documentation appears ahead-of-state for this milestone and can mislead workers on actual module layout/interfaces.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:26-33 and 60-71 describe a problems/ subpackage and CodeExecutionProblem interface, while commit a81c242 adds mtb/quality_benchmarks/coding_problems.py, reasoning_problems.py, instruction_problems.py, math_problems.py, writing_problems.py, and eval_problem.py with optional fields on EvalProblem instead.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill file, shared-state docs, and commit a81c242 diff. Feature is complete for its scope and preserves backward compatibility; status is pass. One shared-state documentation drift observation was recorded.
